title: lagenaria leucantha var. microcarpa
intro: Lagenaria leucantha var. microcarpa, also known as the small-fruited bottle gourd, is a variety of vining plant in the Cucurbitaceae family. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits include relief from fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Lagenaria leucantha var. microcarpa include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
